title: Creightons Professional Cleanse & Refresh Shampoo 500ml | Clarifying Salicylic Acid & Rosemary for Scalp Detox | Deep Cleansing for Removing Impurities & Buildup
features: DEEPLY CLARIFIES & DETOXES THE SCALP: This powerful clarifying shampoo with Salicylic Acid helps remove excess oil, impurities, and product buildup, leaving the scalp deeply cleansed and refreshed.
SOOTHES & REVITALISES DRY SCALP: Infused with Rosemary Extract, a natural scalp treatment, this shampoo calms irritation, supports scalp health, and relieves discomfort from dry or flaky skin.

BALANCES SCALP & HAIR FOR MANAGEABLE RESULTS: Designed for anyone seeking a cleaner, healthier scalp, this high-performance shampoo purifies while hydrating strands for smoother, more manageable hair.
KEY INGREDIENTS FOR HEALTHY HAIR & SCALP: With Salicylic Acid - a proven scalp exfoliator and Rosemary to promote a healthy scalp environment, this is the ultimate scalp detox solution.
HOW TO USE FOR BEST RESULTS: Massage this deep cleansing shampoo into wet hair and rinse thoroughly. For enhanced softness and shine, follow with Cleanse & Refresh Conditioner.
description: Product Description Creightons Professional Cleanse & Refresh Shampoo 500ml is infused with clarifying Salicylic Acid and soothing Rosemary Extract to deeply cleanse and detox the scalp. This gentle yet effective shampoo removes impurities, excess oil, and buildup, leaving the scalp feeling refreshed and perfectly cleansed. It works as both a scalp cleanser and moisturiser, supporting a healthy scalp environment. Ideal for regular use, it promotes clean, soft, and balanced hair. For optimal results, use alongside Cleanse & Refresh Conditioner. All Creightons Professional products were made and developed in England. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Chloride, Cocamide MEA, Glycol Distearate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Glycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium EDTA, Allantoin, Hydroxypropyl Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Salicylic Acid, Polyquaternium-7, Saccharide Isomerate, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Sodium Citrate, Menthol. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs rinse thoroughly with water. See more
